signals.name: Hiring pace — senior leads
signals.why: Without leads in seat, ICs cannot start. Without ICs, Phase 1 cannot ship.

signals.name: AI search visibility score
signals.why: The cheapest signal in the set. Configuration work, not capability work. If this isn't moving, nothing else is.

signals.name: Customer-support deflection (public surface)
signals.why: Internal Zendesk delivers 50%+ deflection. The public number is the externalisation test.

signals.name: AI-callable surface live in registries
signals.why: The closing-window argument. Every quarter without a published surface, third-party services accumulate citation authority on Eurail brand queries.

signals.name: Bilateral pilot MoUs signed
signals.why: Phase 2 cannot start without 2–3 of {DB, SBB, ÖBB, NS} agreeing to pilot. If MoU pace is slow, the cross-operator moat conversion is slipping.

signals.name: Customer-trust trajectory (Trustpilot eurail.com)
signals.why: Lifetime aggregate is high-inertia (3.9 today). The signal is the rolling 90-day delta, not the headline.

escalation_rule: Two reds at month 3 — pause Phase 1 commitments; almost always lead hiring is stuck or the platform vendor isn't delivering. Three reds at month 6 — trigger an external review; bring a second vendor to evaluate Phase 0 delivery. Any red at month 12 — the program is meaningfully off-track; Phase 2 should not start while Phase 1 is being fixed.
